top_signals.title: Oil prices fall on hopes of Strait of Hormuz reopening
top_signals.summary: Biggest monthly decline in Brent crude since 2020 comes amid signs US and Iran could be close to a deal
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: EU seeks to 'intensify' talks with U.S. on advanced cyber AI models, official tells CNBC, amid Mythos concerns
top_signals.summary: Anthropic's Mythos model, which has advanced cyber abilities, has prompted a wave of concern from governments and businesses.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: SpaceX skeptics have added reason for concern after Musk comments diverge from IPO filing
top_signals.summary: In a post on X, Elon Musk offered details about SpaceX's deal with Anthropic that weren't included in the company's IPO prospectus.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: New Zealand budget spares defense, intelligence agencies from cuts
top_signals.summary: “The rules-based global system is under strain. Countries are boosting their spending on defense," said Finance Minister Nicola Willis.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Google Chrome adds session cookie theft protection for all users
top_signals.summary: Google says the Chrome Device Bound Session Credentials (DBSC) security feature is now generally available and is rolling out to all users to prevent account takeovers. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: N.Z. to decide on Japan’s Mogami frigates by end of 2027, defense chief says
top_signals.summary: New Zealand Defense Minister Chris Penk highlighted interoperability with Australia as a key factor in the ongoing deliberations.
